initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS avg_ss_quantity,
    AVG(ss_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ss_ext_sales_price,
    AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS avg_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
    SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS sum_ss_ext_wholesale_cost
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON store_sales.ss_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    household_demographics ON store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND (
        (customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('M', 'S', 'D') 
         AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('Advanced Degree', 'College', '4 Year Degree'))
        OR (store_sales.ss_sales_price > 100.00)
        OR (household_demographics.hd_dep_count > 2)
    )
    AND (
        (customer_address.ca_country = 'United States')
        OR (customer_address.ca_state IN ('TX', 'CA', 'NY', 'FL', 'GA'))
        OR (store_sales.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 500)
    );

SELECT
  AVG(ss_quantity) AS avg_ss_quantity,
  AVG(ss_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ss_ext_sales_price,
  AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS avg_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
  SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS sum_ss_ext_wholesale_cost
FROM
  store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  JOIN customer_demographics ON store_sales.ss_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND (
    (customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('M', 'D', 'S') AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('Advanced Degree', 'College', '2 yr Degree'))
    OR (store_sales.ss_sales_price > 100.00 AND household_demographics.hd_dep_count > 2)
    OR (customer_address.ca_country = 'United States' AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'NY'))
  )
  AND (
    (customer_address.ca_country = 'United States')
    OR (customer_address.ca_state IN ('FL', 'GA', 'OH'))
    OR (store_sales.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 500)
  );

SELECT 
  AVG(ss_quantity) AS avg_ss_quantity,
  AVG(ss_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ss_ext_sales_price,
  AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS avg_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
  SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS sum_ss_ext_wholesale_cost
FROM 
  store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  JOIN customer_demographics ON store_sales.ss_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
  JOIN household_demographics ON store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND (
    (customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('M', 'S', 'D') OR
     customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Advanced Degree', 'Secondary') OR
     store_sales.ss_sales_price > 100.0)
    OR
    (household_demographics.hd_dep_count > 3)
  )
  AND (
    (customer_address.ca_country = 'United States' OR
     customer_address.ca_state IN ('CA', 'TX', 'FL', 'NY', 'IL') OR
     store_sales.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 500)
  );

candidates.sql:
SELECT
  AVG(ss_quantity) AS avg_ss_quantity,
  AVG(ss_ext_sales_price) AS avg_ss_ext_sales_price,
  AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS avg_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
  SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS sum_ss_ext_wholesale_cost
FROM store_sales
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON store_sales.ss_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2001
  AND (
    (customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'U') AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', 'Doctorate'))
    OR (store_sales.ss_sales_price > 150.0 AND household_demographics.hd_dep_count > 3)
    OR (customer_address.ca_country = 'United States' AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('WA', 'VA', 'PA'))
  )
  AND (
    (customer_address.ca_country = 'United States')
    OR (customer_address.ca_state IN ('NC', 'SC', 'AL'))
    OR (store_sales.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 200 AND 600)
  );
